principle: Clearforge social assets should clearly signal a subject and payoff, but quality imperfections do not block otherwise safe publication.

checks.opening: If you want an AI model you can actually customize, this one is worth a look.
Can AI help catch security issues in pull requests without blocking your merge process?
Have you ever picked a tool and then wondered whether the service behind it could actually keep up?
The next useful AI layer in software is not just code generation; it is review-time control.
